title: OG1.0 Data Format
description: The OceanGliders format (OG1.0, released June 2024) provides a community standard for glider data files, ensuring interoperability across platforms and institutions.

title: Standard Operating Procedures
description: Community-reviewed SOPs cover key sensors including oxygen, salinity, nitrate, chlorophyll, depth-average currents, ADCP, and vertical velocities.

title: Real-Time Data
description: Data are transmitted via satellite in near real time (every few hours) and disseminated through global databases for both operational and research communities.
